scope: Module 1 and Module 2 evidence, migration pattern decision
entry_criteria: Baseline app evidence and dependency inventory exist
key_activities: Review discovery findings; approve migration pattern; confirm open questions
exit_criteria: Recommended pattern and ADR log approved

scope: Spring Boot app, Maven build, package dependencies, container packaging
entry_criteria: Source builds locally; package dependencies known
key_activities: Create production Dockerfile; define image tagging; define build-time egress; prepare ACR integration
exit_criteria: Container image can be built repeatably and scanned

scope: PostgreSQL target, schema conversion, row-count/checksum validation and connection-string remediation
entry_criteria: Active database engine confirmed; target PostgreSQL Flexible Server deployed; validation harness ready
key_activities: Run final source validation; complete offline migration; validate target row counts and application smoke queries; confirm rollback window
exit_criteria: Database target validated and approved for application cutover

scope: Azure Container Apps, ACR image, managed identity, health endpoint and app config
entry_criteria: Container image, target IaC, secrets and App Configuration approach ready
key_activities: Deploy target revision; confirm managed identity, app settings, Key Vault references, health and revision traffic
exit_criteria: Target endpoint passes smoke tests and revision is ready for controlled traffic

scope: Ingress, egress, DNS, TLS, secrets and unknown flow validation
entry_criteria: Application and database targets deployed in Azure; network dependencies documented
key_activities: Validate TCP 8443; validate SMTP-like flow; apply egress allowlist; configure DNS/TLS; confirm WAF and private endpoint strategy
exit_criteria: Network controls approved and no unresolved P1 dependency blockers

scope: Production DNS/config cutover, validation, rollback and 24-72 hour hypercare
entry_criteria: Change approval complete; smoke tests, regression checks, rollback owner, monitoring dashboards and support bridge ready
key_activities: Freeze source writes if needed; switch DNS/config; run smoke, dependency and performance checks; monitor health; execute rollback if triggers are met
exit_criteria: Cutover accepted, rollback window closed and hypercare completed
